channel.title: MishMash Centre for AI and Creativity - News
channel.description: Latest news from MishMash Centre for AI and Creativity

item.title: Meet MishMash's new administrative coordinator
item.description: This week, Eskil Muan Sæther began his position as administrative coordinator of MishMash. He will be physically based at the University of Oslo but will work virtually with everyone in the network...

item.title: MishMash's Council has been appointed
item.description:
Following the official signature of the MishMash consortium agreements, the partners have appointed the following members to serve on the MishMash Council:
André Alexandersen Hauge (Østfold Uni...

item.title: MishMash's Board has been appointed
item.description:
The formal establishment is continuing. After the MishMash Council was appointed last week, they have now appointed the following members for the MishMash Board:
Sunniva Whittaker (University o...

item.title: MishMash formally opened
item.description: MishMash was formally opened yesterday with a full-day program featuring a hackathon, research application workshop, work package meetings, industry panel, match-making session, and, finally, the g...
